name: Strawberry Cheesecake Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease large muffin tins or line with paper baking cups.
2. Blend cream cheese and icing sugar until smooth; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. In another bowl, beat the egg, milk, brown sugar, melted butter, and almond extract.
5. Stir the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients, stirring just until moistened.
6. Spoon half of the batter into muffin cups.
7. Top each muffin with 1 tablespoon of cream cheese mixture and 1 teaspoon of strawberry jam.
8. Spoon the remaining batter on top.
9. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 C) for about 20 minutes, or until light golden.
10. Cool in the pan for 5 minutes; remove muffins and cool on a rack.
11. Store in an airtight container.
